scripts.analysis:run: npm run manifest:sync && node scripts/runTs.cjs scripts/analyze.ts
scripts.backup:create: npm run manifest:sync && node scripts/runTs.cjs scripts/createBackup.ts
scripts.webview:bundle: npm run core:build && npm run protocol:build && mkdir -p SenseiMobile/app_web/webview_dist && esbuild src/index.tsx --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --target=es2020 --sourcemap --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' --outfile=SenseiMobile/app_web/webview_dist/index.js --loader:.ts=ts --loader:.tsx=tsx --loader:.txt=text --external:@google/genai --external:marked --external:mermaid --external:jszip --external:@google/generative-ai --external:@codemirror/state --external:@codemirror/view --external:@codemirror/language --external:@codemirror/commands --external:@codemirror/autocomplete --external:@codemirror/lang-cpp --external:@codemirror/highlight --external:@codemirror/gutter --external:@lezer/highlight --external:w3c-keyname --external:react-native --external:@react-native/assets-registry --external:react-native-safe-area-context && cp src/index.css SenseiMobile/app_web/webview_dist/index.css && cp src/index.html SenseiMobile/app_web/webview_dist/index.html && cp src/Modules.txt SenseiMobile/app_web/webview_dist/Modules.txt
